mnemonics.title: Fork Return Values
mnemonics.content: Parent Pays, Child Charges Nothing. (Parent gets the child's PID (a positive number), Child gets 0).

mnemonics.title: exec Function Suffixes
mnemonics.content: L for List, V for Vector (argv array), P for PATH search, E for Environment. Remember the combinations: execl, execv, execlp, execvp, execle, execve.
